use_cases: Hero section headline with dramatic blur-to-clear reveal animation
Landing page text entrance animations with staggered letter reveals
Welcome or intro messages with elegant character-by-character animation
Section titles that animate on scroll into view
Brand taglines with eye-catching reveal effects
ai_summary: A text animation component that reveals characters one-by-one with a blur-to-clear morphing effect using Framer Motion. Splits text into individual characters and animates each with staggered timing, creating an elegant headline reveal commonly used in hero sections and landing pages to grab attention.
